summary: Tested 4 new KitaTracker features: 1) Recurring Generate Entries button, 2) Import with Target Month selector, 3) Dashboard/Chart improvements, 4) Reports page bar charts. All features working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements present and functional.
passed_tests: Recurring Page - Generate Entries button is visible and clickable
Recurring Page - Generate button is disabled when no active recurring transactions
Recurring Page - Generate button becomes enabled after adding recurring transaction
Recurring Page - Generate button creates entries and shows success toast
Dashboard - Auto-generate recurring on login (sessionStorage flag implemented)
Settings Import - Target Month picker is visible in import dialog
Settings Import - Can select different months for import (tested 2026-02)
Settings Import - Import type buttons (Income/Expense) present
Dashboard - Income vs Expenses line chart present with ResponsiveContainer
Dashboard - Product pie chart (donut style) present
Dashboard - Category pie chart (donut style) present
Dashboard - Month picker present and functional
Reports page - Income by Product section with bar chart
Reports page - Income by Customer section with bar chart
Reports page - Expenses by Category section with bar chart
Reports page - Month picker and Print button present
Mobile responsiveness - Dashboard charts visible on mobile viewport
critical_code_review_comments: RecurringPage.js: Generate Entries button correctly disabled when transactions.filter(t => t.is_active).length === 0
DashboardPage.js: Auto-generate recurring on load uses sessionStorage flag 'recurring_generated' to prevent duplicate calls
SettingsPage.js: importMonth state initialized with getCurrentMonth() and Target Month picker uses type='month' input
Charts use ResponsiveContainer with proper height settings for responsiveness
Pie charts use innerRadius='35%' and outerRadius='70%' for donut style
Bar charts in ReportsPage use angled labels (angle={-45}) for better readability
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test recurring transaction during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features are working: 1) Generate Entries button on Recurring page creates income/expense entries from due recurring transactions, 2) Import dialog has Target Month picker to select which month to import entries to, 3) Dashboard charts use ResponsiveContainer and donut-style pie charts, 4) Reports page has bar charts with angled labels. Backend models.py file created for centralized models (partial refactoring).
